title: Waverley report published
body: "Today, we have published our accident investigation report into the heavy contact made by the paddle steamer Waverley with the eastern pier at Brodick, Isle of Arran, Scotland on 3 September 2020.   The report, available via this link, contains details of what happened and subsequent actions taken.    Media enquiries (telephone only)       Media enquiries during office hours 01932 440015   Media enquiries out of hours 0300 7777878      "
